scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:cli
scripts.check: npm run check:node && npm run test:contracts
scripts.check:node: npm run check:backend && npm run check:frontend && npm run check:cli
scripts.check:frontend: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix frontend run type-check && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.check:cli: npm --prefix cli run check && npm --prefix cli run build
